services/backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 4.0.6 to align with the Java 21 migration and Spring Boot 4 release.
services/backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4 requires Java 21 and introduces breaking API changes; staying on 3.3.4 would cause runtime incompatibilities and prevent access to new features.

services/backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to enforce JDK 21 compilation and runtime.
services/backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4 mandates Java 21; compiling with Java 17 will fail due to missing language features and module requirements.

services/backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Spring Cloud version to 2025.1.1 to match Spring Boot 4 compatibility.
services/backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Cloud 2023.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 4; using it would cause dependency resolution failures or runtime class conflicts.

services/backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit Spring Framework core module version properties as they are managed by the Spring Boot BOM.
Remove explicit Eureka client version property as it is managed by the Spring Cloud BOM.
Remove explicit Tomcat embed core version property as it is managed by the Spring Boot BOM.
Remove explicit Spring LDAP core version property as it is managed by the Spring Boot BOM.
Add Guava version property to manage the new dependency.
Remove manual exclusions of Spring core modules from spring-boot-starter-web, relying on BOM management.
Replace spring-boot-starter-aop with spring-boot-starter-aspectj to align with Spring Boot 4 AOP implementation changes.
services/backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4 may have deprecated or removed the default AspectJ Weaver integration in the AOP starter, requiring the explicit AspectJ starter for AOP functionality.

services/backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove manual exclusion of spring-ldap-core from spring-boot-starter-data-ldap.
Remove explicit dependencies for Spring core modules (core, web, webmvc, context) as they are provided transitively by starters.
Remove explicit version from spring-cloud-starter-netflix-eureka-client to rely on Spring Cloud BOM management.
Remove explicit tomcat-embed-core dependency as it is provided by spring-boot-starter-web.
Replace spring-ldap-core dependency with Guava, likely due to refactoring LDAP logic or replacing utility usage.
Add spring-boot-webmvc-test dependency for testing support in Spring Boot 4.
Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin to 0.8.14 for compatibility with Java 21 and Spring Boot 4.
services/backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may not support Java 21 bytecode or may conflict with Spring Boot 4's test infrastructure.

services/backend/src/main/java/com/scb/s.general_idea: Update import statements for RestTemplateBuilder and RestTemplateAutoConfiguration to match Spring Boot 4 package structure.
services/backend/src/main/java/com/scb/s.why_exists: The classes org.springframework.boot.web.client.RestTemplateBuilder and org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.web.client.RestTemplateAutoConfiguration were removed in Spring Boot 4; using them causes a compile error (class not found).

services/backend/src/main/java/com/scb/s.general_idea: Replace deprecated setConnectTimeout method with connectTimeout on RestTemplateBuilder.
services/backend/src/main/java/com/scb/s.why_exists: The method setConnectTimeout was removed from RestTemplateBuilder in Spring Boot 4; calling it causes a compile error (method not found).

services/backend/src/main/java/com/scb/s.general_idea: Replace deprecated setReadTimeout method with readTimeout on RestTemplateBuilder.
services/backend/src/main/java/com/scb/s.why_exists: The method setReadTimeout was removed from RestTemplateBuilder in Spring Boot 4; calling it causes a compile error (method not found).

services/backend/src/main/java/com/scb/s.general_idea: Replace deprecated @ConditionalOnProperty with @Profile for cleaner profile activation.
Refactor local mock services to use dependency injection and fixture data instead of hardcoded values.
Add new local mock beans for MFA, Authorization, and Application Category services.
Implement LocalLoginFixture to load mock user data from a JSON file.
Update LocalAnalyticService to store events in memory and support filtering.
Remove unused imports and comments related to the old implementation.
Update import for ServerProperties to reflect its new package location in Spring Boot 4.
services/backend/src/main/java/com/scb/s.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.web.ServerProperties does not exist in Spring Boot 4; it has been moved to org.springframework.boot.web.server.autoconfigure.ServerProperties, causing a compile error.

services/backend/src/main/java/com/scb/s.general_idea: Update import for TomcatServletWebServerFactory to reflect its new package location in Spring Boot 4.
services/backend/src/main/java/com/scb/s.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.web.embedded.tomcat.TomcatServletWebServerFactory does not exist in Spring Boot 4; it has been moved to org.springframework.boot.tomcat.servlet.TomcatServletWebServerFactory, causing a compile error.
